description: PostHog product analytics + session recording + feature flags. Self-hosted or PostHog Cloud (US / EU).

api_key.description: PostHog project API key. NOT the personal API key.

host.description: PostHog host. `app.posthog.com` for US Cloud; `eu.posthog.com` for EU Cloud; a custom URL for self-hosted.

enable_session_recording.description: Enable PostHog session recording. Requires tenant analytics_session_recording entitlement + subject functional consent.

capture_pageview.description: Whether the driver auto-fires $pageview alongside track events. Off for server-side-only tenants.

person_properties_set_once.description: Property names to set via $set_once (idempotent) rather than $set. Used for immutable properties like signup_date.
